itemListElement.reviewBody: I'm a teacher at school, there is very healthy environment in the school to learn new things. Everything is awesome.

itemReviewed.name: Fr. Agnels Vidyankur School - Pune City

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My daughter is studying in this school and we experienced with school ,the school is amazing n teachers and staff also very polite n co-operative ,we like the school .the discipline is superb if someone see the school n children's you will also say the school should be like this.I will salute to the school n all management team .I really thankful of god we got admission in the vidyankur school.
the campus and ground is huge n fulfill with greenery it's very healthy n helpful to child .

itemReviewed.name: Fr. Agnels Vidyankur School - Pune City

itemListElement.reviewBody: The most loved school.I was here till my 10th std.Its teaching and non-teaching staff are supporting.Education is high tech with well educomp facilities,there are many playgrounds for children as well as many sports are promoted by school.

itemReviewed.name: Fr. Agnels Vidyankur School - Pune City

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst experience/ Pathetic...This school was nearby that's why I had no option.. I never liked this school.. Principal specially doesn't have manners how to talk to parents, she is fake. She beings very polite in front of people..they keep waiting always if you have any queries..But they don't try to solve problems of students, parents. I had a big issue in the school, they don't put the matters and students genuine problems in front of management,principal tries to close the matter at her level only..they don't put put in front of management..there was an issue with the class teacher , she treated very badly with my daughter, when I went to meet teacher she said I don't have time to talk to you, take appointment and then when I call then come, and it was very urgent to talk to her, daughter used to cry because of teachers bad behavior.. And teacher was not ready to talk to me atleast for 5 minutes also. If any big issues or small they don't inform the management. .. I was fed up with this their behavior.. After that principal was not treating properly after that matter. . I met principal. . But they don't accept their teachers fault.. I can't write everything here. . In this school every thing is in the control of the principal. Finally I got out of this school. . Took admission for my daughter in other school. . Much better now.This school  is only into money making business. ..

itemReviewed.name: Fr. Agnels Vidyankur School - Pune City

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This school is best school in this area, having a large land and a big campus.

It's also known as Fr. Angel Ashram (Pilar Fathers & Brothers)

This school managed by Society of St. Francis Xavier, Pilar, India.

This campus is having 6 Part, which is:

- Fr. Angel's Vidyankur Pre-Primary
- Fr. Angel's Vidyankur Primary
- Fr. Angel's Vidyankur Secondary
- Fr. Angel's Vidyankur Junior College
- Fr. Angel Balbhawan
- Fr. Angel wellness Centre
